reference: Today we went to Burger King and my daughter was in her car seat when the lady at the counter put our fries on the tray. They tipped over into her car seat, flaming hot. She screamed; the fries burned her little neck, skin came off. What should I put on it to help her with the redness?
text: Today we went to Burger King and my daughter was in her car seat and the lady at the corner put up a say. It took over into her car seat, raining hard. She screamed. The flies burned her very neck. Skin came off. I should have seen her. She had her little redness.
